title: Legacy Potion Colors
description: Client side mod that brings back visuals from older versions of minecraft.
body:
# **LEGACY IS DISCONTINUED**
### **_Features of Legacy have been ported to my new client mod [Journal](https://modrinth.com/mod/journal) along with new features and improvements._**

## Old Description
Currently legacy only reintroduces the old potion colors reverting them back to the way they were pre 1.19.4.

I hopefully plan on adding more content back from older versions.

This mod is also entirely Client side so feel free to use it on servers without any risk!
